title: Palestinian Journalist Describes Losing Prosthetic Eye in Israeli Detention
detail: A Palestinian journalist released from Israeli custody recounted losing his prosthetic eye while held in an Israeli prison, describing conditions of medical neglect and harsh detention. The firsthand account, aired by Al Jazeera, details the denial of adequate medical care and deteriorating conditions for Palestinian detainees — raising renewed concerns about treatment of civilian and journalist prisoners held by Israeli authorities.
